channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Woman with ‘completely normal’ life woke up with aches — and was left paralyzed  New York Post
  2. This is Charlie, she was living a ‘normal life’ before being struck down by a sudden paralysis caused by a rare condition. 😢 Charlie worked in Magaluf and had been for a walk on the beach on a ‘completely normal’ day when she woke up with what felt like ‘gy  facebook.com
  3. Brit thought she woke with 'gym aches' in Magaluf - but the truth was far more sinister  The Mirror
  4. Darlington woman hit by rare condition had to be fed through straw  Chronicle Live
  5. North-east woman paralysed in Mallorca due to 'once-in-a-lifetime illness'  Yorkshire Live

item.title: The chocolate industry is built on the labour of bloodsucking midges - The Economist
item.description: The chocolate industry is built on the labour of bloodsucking midges  The Economist
